overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a morning walk through a rural American plantation setting. The camera moves past outbuildings and livestock, then approaches a large wooden mansion with formal gardens.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead with outbuildings and fenced pasture

events.description: horse-drawn wooden wagon passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path past a small wooden outbuilding toward a fenced pasture area

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered to a wooden fence
wooden wagon with horses passing along the path

entered.detail: small white wooden cabin with porch and standing figure
split-rail wooden fence lining the dirt path
large two-story wooden mansion with wrap-around porch visible on the hill
reddish dirt trail with grass verges and wagon tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens near a small wooden outbuilding with a figure on the porch. The camera walks along a dirt path past a fenced area where a horse stands tethered. A horse-drawn wagon passes by on the right, and in the distance, a large plantation house sits atop a grassy hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hill approach to plantation house

agents.ego_description: ascending the grassy hill on the dirt path toward the plantation house

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking up the grassy hill on the dirt path. The small outbuilding and fence fall behind as the plantation house grows larger in the frame. The landscape is open with scattered trees and tall grass lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation house entrance courtyard with formal garden

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto brick patio as approaching the house side entrance
formal garden with geometric shrubbery and flower beds comes into view

agents.ego_description: approaching the plantation house and moving around toward the side garden entrance

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near the house entrance in the distance

entered.detail: red brick paved courtyard area with geometric patterns
geometrically arranged flower beds with red and white blooms
tall conical shaped shrubs lining the garden paths

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the house and steps onto a brick patio. Moving around the side of the mansion, the scene transitions to a formal garden with manicured boxwood hedges and flower beds. Two figures can be seen standing near the distant entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden courtyard alongside the mansion

events.description: passing a wheelbarrow and garden implements near the house wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the manicured garden alongside the house, observing the landscaping and potted plants

entered.detail: wooden wheelbarrow with metal wheel resting against the house
large stone planters with red flowers on pedestals

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the formal garden alongside the house, passing a wheelbarrow and decorative stone urns. The garden features symmetrical planting beds with conical shrubs and flowering plants, while the house's wooden porch and columns remain visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic farmyard up a grassy incline toward the refined elegance of a plantation mansion and its formal gardens. It begins on a dirt path by a small wooden outbuilding and a tethered horse, passing a horse-drawn wagon as the large house appears in the distance atop a hill. As the camera ascends the slope, the rural outbuildings recede and the landscape opens into wide stretches of tall grass and scattered trees, bringing the mansion into full view. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the house and steps onto a brick patio, moving around the side of the building to reveal a transition into a manicured garden. Finally, the camera glides deeper into this symmetrical landscape of boxwood hedges, stone urns, and conical shrubs, while the wooden columns of the porch remain visible to the left.
